meaning: n.蛋彩画(用蛋清代油调和的鸡蛋水胶养料画法)
examples: Tempera was used to paint frescos hundreds of years ago.
Artists keep experiencing the infinite charm of tempera painting.
One theory is that the word tempura came from the Spanish tempera, meaning temperature.
Instead, they favored traditional tempera renderings of gods, local relics and rural folk.
The intellectual practices of doubting authority and trying out experiments happened on lutes and with tempera on gesso before they turned toward the stars.
